meta.title: Highly Sensitive Person Reflection
meta.description: A private 500-statement reflection across 20 dimensions of sensory processing sensitivity.

levels.label: Very High Sensitivity Pattern
levels.desc: Your responses suggest consistently deep processing, strong environmental responsiveness, and a relatively low threshold for stimulation.

levels.label: High Sensitivity Pattern
levels.desc: You appear highly responsive across many sensory, emotional, social, and environmental situations.

levels.label: Moderate Sensitivity Pattern
levels.desc: You show a mixture of sensitive and less-sensitive responses, with some dimensions standing out more than others.

levels.label: Lower Sensitivity Pattern
levels.desc: You may notice some sensitivity traits, but stimulation and environmental changes usually have a more limited effect.

levels.label: Low Sensitivity Pattern
levels.desc: Your responses suggest a relatively high threshold for stimulation and less intensive processing of subtle environmental input.

questions.text: In everyday life, I reflect deeply on experiences before moving on.
In busy places, I usually process experiences quickly without revisiting them.
During an ordinary week, I connect new experiences with patterns I noticed before.
When several things happen at once, I rarely look beneath the immediate meaning of an experience.
